task_description: Add a Code Project mode to Sketchware Pro that provides a full-code IDE experience (file explorer, editable code editor with sora-editor, direct compilation of raw .java/.xml source files) alongside the existing drag-and-drop block-based system.

verification.summary: BUILD SUCCESSFUL with ./gradlew assembleDebug after code review fixes. No test suite exists in this project (CI only runs assembleRelease). Docker build not applicable (Android project). All new code compiles cleanly. CodeProjectBuilder.java was force-added because it was gitignored by the broad build/ pattern.

review_fixes.commit: fix: Address code review issues in CodeProjectBuilder
issues_fixed: Replaced Runtime.exec(zip) with Java ZipOutputStream for APK assembly
Added AAPT2 extraction caching guard (check file exists with correct size)
Added isFinishing() check before posting to UI thread from build thread
Disabled build menu item during build to prevent double-tap
Improved AAPT2 error detection by checking output file existence
Added TODO comment noting undo history loss on file switch (acceptable for v1)
Escaped XML special characters in app name before interpolation
